general.name: mos_target_galah_dr3
general.description: The GALAH DR3 main catalogue. See https://www.galah-survey.org/dr3/table_schema/
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_galah_dr3.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='fits' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

survey_name.name: survey_name
survey_name.description: Name of survey as part of GALAH+DR3

flag_repeat.name: flag_repeat
flag_repeat.description: Repeat observation flag, indicating if used for clean catalog

irfm_ebv.name: irfm_ebv
irfm_ebv.description: E(B-V) used for IRFM teff estimation

logg.name: logg
logg.description: Surface gravity (not fitted via spectra if wg4_pipeline not free)

fe_h.name: fe_h
fe_h.description: Fe atomic abundance from Fe lines (final, 1D-NLTE)

fe_h_atmo.name: fe_h_atmo

chi2_sp.name: chi2_sp
